category_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage says it changes settings in configuration text files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name; official homepage and repository use setconf.
docs_sources: Official homepage provides usage, examples, arguments, install notes, and links the source repository.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official homepage says source and issue tracker are available at GitHub and gives git clone https://github.com/xyproto/setconf.
tags_sources: source_facts.description; official homepage describes changing configuration textfile fields and supported arguments.
